name: web_researcher
description: Web research and scraping tool. Searches the web via DuckDuckGo, discovers and parses RSS/Atom feeds, fetches web pages, and extracts readable text content. Uses only the Python standard library with optional duckduckgo-search package for enhanced results.

url.description: Target URL (required for fetch, extract, find_feeds, parse_feed actions)

max_results.description: Maximum number of search results to return (default: 10)

max_entries.description: Maximum number of feed entries to return (default: 20)

output.description: Optional file path to write result JSON
